identity.description: Personal details, bio, and contact information. Best retrieved via semantic vector search.

timeline.description: Chronological history of major events and accomplishments. Requires hybrid search for dates (sparse) and event concepts (dense).

skills.description: Specific technical languages, databases, tools, and proficiency levels. Key-term matching (sparse) is critical.

projects.description: Comprehensive project details, stacks, repos, and status. Hybrid strategy retrieves specific tech terms and features.

achievements.description: Certifications, academic achievements, and contest standings.

psychology.description: Mindsets, operational style, drive, and personal philosophies. High-density semantic search needed.

experience.description: Professional experience, research roles, and campus ambassadorships.

learning.description: Completed courses and readings. Relies on title/topic matching.

goals.description: Short, mid, and long-term professional aspirations and vision.

interview_prep.description: STAR-format behavioral responses and architectural deep-dives. Matches questions to best Q&A pairs.
